form.formComment: At the latest run second last of 9 at Antalya on March 26 over 2000m, 66 len behind Tasan with 59kg at $5.40. Before that scored a big 4 len win at this track March 12 over 2100m defeating Edizbaris with 58.5kg at $5.95. Cannot be ruled out despite a plain effort last time.

form.formComment: Most recently 3rd of 7 at this track in G2 on March 22 over 1900m, 5.5 len behind Beyazisik carrying 59kg at $25.05. The run before that 3rd of 8 at this track on February 22 over 1900m, 1.1 len behind Itaatsiz with 57kg at $2.95. Hard to make a case on recent form.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming ran on from midfield and won by a 0.1 len at Antalya February 17 over 2200m defeating Kizil Gezegen with 57kg at $5.35. Last start came from midfield and won by a 0.4 len at Veliefendi All Weather April 4 over 2000m defeating Ersansah with 58.5kg at $2.05. This race is well within his grasp.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 47-day let-up. Last start 4th of 8 at this track on February 22 over 1900m, 1.4 len behind Itaatsiz with 57kg at $3.15. Before that won by 1.1 len at this track February 6 over 2000m defeating Tabip carrying 57kg at $4.35. Showed enough last start to suggest he can take this out.
